title: task
description: Policy: appendix-c-safety.md. Enable -fsanitize=memtag (ARM MTE) or -fcf-protection=full (Intel CET) for Linux border router builds.
close_reason: Fixed: Added lichen/cmake/lichen_hardening.cmake with CMake checks for ARM MTE (-fsanitize=memtag) and Intel CET (-fcf-protection=full). Module provides lichen_check_arm_mte(), lichen_check_intel_cet(), and lichen_target_hardware_hardening() functions. Updated virtual-hub CMakeLists.txt as example usage.
